name: Allbridge Zero
description: Allbridge is a leading cross-chain provider that has evolved from a lock-and-mint model to native-liquidity bridging via Allbridge Core. The project focuses on seamless transfers of native stablecoins across various blockchain ecosystems. With the launch of ABR0, the protocol introduces a new omnichain token designed specifically to integrate into the Allbridge Core ecosystem, moving away from legacy architectures to a more transparent and scalable multichain model.
